- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29, 18:20): "Pregnant or breastfeeding women should consult a physician before, and then those with severe autoimmune diseases, just because they could be a little powerful, may want to start with lower doses before you create too dramatic of a change within the body." https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/stop-aging-now-bioregulatorsthe-future-of-longevity-in-a-capsule--84fe77e0/
